headline: Where Analysts Pushed Back On PEP Stock's Latest Earnings Call
summary: PepsiCo management spent its latest earnings call defending its big bet on North American growth, and the answers revealed exactly where the strategy is under pressure.

raw.headline: Where Analysts Pushed Back On PEP Stock's Latest Earnings Call

headline: General Mills and Box Tops for Education Reunite "Saved by the Bell" Cast to Celebrate 30 Years of Giving Back to Schools
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, July 14, 2026--Box Tops for Education is heading back to Bayside High with the cast of "Saved by the Bell" to celebrate 30 years and nearly $1 billion raised for schools nationwide. General Mills, in partnership with Universal Products & Experiences, is reuniting the iconic cast for Saved by the Box Tops, a feel-good back-to-school campaign inspired by the beloved television series and the everyday impact of Box Tops for Education.
